name: com.undercurrentholdings/aegis
description: Six-gate governance for AI agents: PROCEED/PAUSE/HALT decisions with hash-chained audit trails.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY — free key from https://portal.undercurrentholdings.com (Community tier, 100 evaluations/month)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional - omit for sandbox mode (10 evaluations/day). Free key at https://portal.undercurrentholdings.com
